headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.razorpay.com https://*.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.unsplash.com https://*.razorpay.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.razorpay.com https://*.stripe.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.razorpay.com https://*.stripe.com;
